items.title: iOS 26.4.2: Apple Issues Unexpected iPhone Update To Block FBI Data Extraction Method
items.description: Apple has released a new iPhone update — that has taken many by surprise — to address a vulnerability that was recently exploited by the FBI.

items.title: Google Splits Its AI Chip. Here’s Why It Matters For Enterprises.
items.description: Google's 8th-gen TPUs split training and inference into two chips. Here's what it means for enterprise AI infrastructure strategy in 2026.

items.title: Sovereign AI: Why Owning The Full Stack Is The New Strategic Imperative
items.description: The central question is no longer whether an organization will use AI. It is how much of that AI the organization will actually own.

items.title: ‘Pragmata’: A Parental Odyssey
items.description: Capcom's brand new IP delivers on gameplay innovation and an emotional story.

items.title: A Car Rental Stock Soared 700% In A Month. Is It A Meme Stock?
items.description: Avis shares have skyrocketed in a matter of weeks, reminding investors of memestocks like GameStop.
